epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate transition planning.
lead.deck: With no clear timeline documented and multiple active projects in motion, addressing the departure now prevents operational disruption across your team's current commitments.
